sentences.target: Ich bin hier in der Minderheit.

translations.de: Ich bin hier in der Minderheit.
translations.vi: Ở đây tôi thuộc số ít.
translations.nl: Hier ben ik in de minderheid.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the copula 'bin'.
Finite copula/auxiliary, 1st person singular, present indicative; links the subject to the predicate ('hier in der Minderheit').
Locative adverb specifying place; modifies the predicate.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; heads the PP 'in der Minderheit' functioning as predicative complement.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Minderheit' as object of the preposition 'in'.
Common noun, feminine; here in dative singular as the complement of 'in', forming part of the predicate.

sentences.target: Die Minderheit möchte einen eigenen Raum.

translations.de: Die Minderheit möchte einen eigenen Raum.
translations.en: The minority wants their own room.
translations.es: La minoría quiere una sala propia.
translations.fr: La minorité veut une salle à part.
translations.it: La minoranza vuole una stanza tutta per sé.
translations.zh-Hans: 少数群体想要一个自己的房间。
translations.yue: 少數群體想要一間自己嘅房。
translations.pt: A minoria quer uma sala própria.
translations.vi: Nhóm thiểu số muốn một phòng riêng.
translations.nl: De minderheid wil een eigen ruimte.
translations.hi: अल्पसंख्यक समूह अपना अलग कमरा चाहता है।
translations.el: Η μειονότητα θέλει δικό της δωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Mindretallet vil ha et eget rom.
translations.id: Kelompok minoritas ingin punya ruangan sendiri.
translations.sv: Minoriteten vill ha ett eget rum.
translations.da: Mindretallet vil have et eget rum.
translations.ja: 少数派は自分たちの部屋がほしい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determines the subject noun 'Minderheit'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular as clause subject.
Finite verb (Konjunktiv II, present), 3rd person singular; expresses polite desire; takes a direct object here (no infinitival complement).
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determines 'Raum' as the direct object.
Attributive adjective, masculine accusative singular, positive degree; agrees with 'Raum'.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'möchte' (understood as 'would like [to have] a room').

sentences.target: Es gibt nur eine kleine Minderheit.

translations.de: Es gibt nur eine kleine Minderheit.
translations.en: There is only a small minority.
translations.fr: Il n'y a qu'une petite minorité.
translations.vi: Chỉ có một nhóm thiểu số nhỏ.
translations.nl: Er is maar een kleine minderheid.
translations.nb: Det er bare et lite mindretall.
translations.sv: Det finns bara en liten minoritet.
translations.da: Der er kun et lille mindretal.
translations.ja: 少数派はごくわずかだ。

tokens.explanation: Pronoun used as expletive subject in the existential construction 'es gibt'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; in 'es gibt' introduces existence and selects an accusative NP.
Focus adverb limiting quantity; scopes over 'eine kleine Minderheit'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Minderheit' as the object of 'gibt'.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular, positive degree; modifies 'Minderheit'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the NP in the existential 'es gibt' construction.

sentences.target: In unserer Klasse bilden sie die Minderheit.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈʊnzəʁɐ ˈklasə ˈbɪldən ziː diː ˈmɪndɐhaɪ̯t/

translations.de: In unserer Klasse bilden sie die Minderheit.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈʊnzəʁɐ ˈklasə ˈbɪldən ziː diː ˈmɪndɐhaɪ̯t/
translations.en: In our class, they make up the minority.
translations.es: En nuestra clase son la minoría.
translations.fr: Dans notre classe, ils sont minoritaires.
translations.it: Nella nostra classe sono la minoranza.
translations.zh-Hans: 在我们班里，他们是少数。
translations.yue: 喺我哋班入面，佢哋係少數。
translations.ru: В нашем классе они в меньшинстве.
translations.pt: Na nossa turma, eles são a minoria.
translations.vi: Trong lớp chúng tôi, họ thuộc số ít.
translations.nl: In onze klas vormen zij de minderheid.
translations.uk: У нашому класі вони в меншості.
translations.hi: हमारी कक्षा में वे अल्पसंख्यक हैं।
translations.pl: W naszej klasie są w mniejszości.
translations.el: Στην τάξη μας αυτοί αποτελούν τη μειοψηφία.
translations.nb: I klassen vår er de i mindretall.
translations.id: Di kelas kami, mereka adalah minoritas.
translations.sv: I vår klass är de i minoritet.
translations.ro: În clasa noastră, ei sunt în minoritate.
translations.cs: V naší třídě jsou v menšině.
translations.da: I vores klasse er de i mindretal.
translations.ja: 私たちのクラスでは、彼らは少数派です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting dative for location; heads the PP 'in unserer Klasse' as a locative adjunct.
Possessive determiner, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Klasse' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of 'In'.
Finite verb, 3rd person plural, present indicative; takes 'die Minderheit' as direct object; 'sie' is the subject.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural, nominative; subject of 'bilden'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Minderheit' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'bilden'.
